title: Addis 502813 Plastic Butler Large Rectangular Bowl, Metallic Silver, 12.5 Litre
features: Raised base which is perfect for draining water underneath
Designed for larger sinks due to the 12 litre capacity
Holds plates with a diameter of up to 10"
Wipes clean - simply wipe over with a damp cloth
Addis - part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 12L Capacity This large washing up bowl has a 12 litre capacity making it perfect for all your family's washing up needs. BPA Free Made from BPA free plastic this sturdy and well-built bowl is also safe. Dimensions W42cm X D32cm X H27cm
